message:
feat(dashboard): add handleVsockSession for vsock I/O bridging

Add handleVsockSession method that bridges WebSocket and vsock I/O for
terminal connections. The method handles bidirectional communication:
- Reads shell protocol messages (MsgData, MsgExit, MsgError) from vsock
  and forwards to WebSocket as terminal_output JSON
- Reads terminal_input and terminal_resize JSON from WebSocket and
  sends as shell protocol messages over vsock

Includes comprehensive tests for data flow in both directions and exit
message handling.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
